title: clematis hilarii
intro: Clematis hilarii, also known as the Western white clematis, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family and is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Clematis hilarii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Clematis hilarii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes due to potential interactions and side effects.
